description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
StackRox Central hostname or IP

API reference for the StackRox Kubernetes Security Platform (upstream of Red Hat Advanced Cluster Security). Provides risk analysis, visibility, runtime alerts, policy management, compliance checking, and vulnerability management for containerized workloads. Authentication uses API tokens generated via /v1/apitokens/generate and passed as Bearer tokens.

Contact Support:
 Email: support@stackrox.com
